findings.title: huggingface/sentence-transformers
findings.description: State-of-the-Art Text Embeddings

findings.title: BlinkDL/RWKV-LM
findings.description: RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN with great LLM performance, which can also be directly trained like a GPT transformer (parallelizable). We are at RWKV-7 "Goose". So it's combining the best of RNN and transformer - great performance, linear time, constant space (no kv-cache), fast training, infinite ctx_len, and free sentence embedding.

findings.title: jina-ai/clip-as-service
findings.description: 🏄 Scalable embedding, reasoning, ranking for images and sentences with CLIP

findings.title: shibing624/text2vec
findings.description: text2vec, text to vector. 文本向量表征工具，把文本转化为向量矩阵，实现了Word2Vec、RankBM25、Sentence-BERT、CoSENT等文本表征、文本相似度计算模型，开箱即用。

findings.title: princeton-nlp/SimCSE
findings.description: [EMNLP 2021] SimCSE: Simple Contrastive Learning of Sentence Embeddings https://arxiv.org/abs/2104.08821

findings.title: Separius/awesome-sentence-embedding
findings.description: A curated list of pretrained sentence and word embedding models

findings.title: facebookresearch/InferSent
findings.description: InferSent sentence embeddings

findings.title: facebookresearch/SentEval
findings.description: A python tool for evaluating the quality of sentence embeddings.

findings.title: yongzhuo/Keras-TextClassification
findings.description: 中文长文本分类、短句子分类、多标签分类、两句子相似度（Chinese Text Classification of Keras NLP, multi-label classify, or sentence classify, long or short），字词句向量嵌入层（embeddings）和网络层（graph）构建基类，FastText，TextCNN，CharCNN，TextRNN,  RCNN,  DCNN, DPCNN, VDCNN, CRNN, Bert, Xlnet, Albert, Attention, DeepMoji, HAN, 胶囊网络-CapsuleNet, Transformer-encode,  Seq2seq,  SWEM, LEAM, TextGCN

findings.title: jasonwei20/eda_nlp
findings.description: Data augmentation for NLP, presented at EMNLP 2019

findings.title: yongzhuo/nlp_xiaojiang
findings.description: 自然语言处理（nlp），小姜机器人（闲聊检索式chatbot），BERT句向量-相似度（Sentence Similarity），XLNET句向量-相似度（text xlnet embedding），文本分类（Text classification）， 实体提取（ner，bert+bilstm+crf），数据增强（text augment, data enhance），同义句同义词生成，句子主干提取（mainpart），中文汉语短文本相似度，文本特征工程，keras-http-service调用

findings.title: dhwajraj/deep-siamese-text-similarity
findings.description: Tensorflow based implementation of deep siamese LSTM network to capture phrase/sentence similarity using character/word embeddings

findings.description: sentence embedding by Smooth Inverse Frequency weighting scheme

findings.title: vec2text/vec2text
findings.description: utilities for decoding deep representations (like sentence embeddings) back to text

findings.title: facebookresearch/SONAR
findings.description: SONAR, a new multilingual and multimodal fixed-size sentence embedding space, with a full suite of speech and text encoders and decoders.
